gals who date

Modern dating is a lot. Gals Who Date is a space to share the good, the bad and the truly baffling — and get honest advice from women who've been there.

why gals who date?

dating is easier with a second opinion

that confusing text, the third date that went nowhere, the ick you can't quite explain — gals who date is where you bring it all and get real talk back.

no judgement, just honest advice and the kind of support that makes modern dating feel a little less lonely.
